textPlain: There's a volunteer-run TWA museum in Kansas City that has a bunch of these! Very cool to see a bunch of their marketing materials together, they produced a lot of interesting work.

Thanks for posting this. I found the style and colours very refreshing compared to contemporary minimalism.However I'm struggling to parse the round object in the first Switzerland poster. Anyone care to help me out?
https://travelstylefun.com/the-fabulous-rose-filled-fountain...Although, it might also be a hat (2nd pic on  https://civilisable.com/traditional-swiss-clothing/ )
